Home / Compare / MezzoX

MezzoX

เมซโซ่ เอ็กซ์

3.9
★ ★ ★ ★ ☆
190 reviews
Origin Thailand / Imported Blend
Roast Levels medium dark espresso
Price Range ฿130–200 / 200g
Founded 2010
Formats ground, whole bean, espresso pods

MezzoX is a growing Thai café chain with a retail ground coffee line that targets young urban professionals. Their blends use a mix of Thai arabica and imported beans for a consistent espresso-forward taste.

Flavor Profile

Espresso-focused profile. Dark and syrupy with notes of dark chocolate, brown sugar, and a hint of dried fruit. Designed for espresso machines and moka pots.

Tasting Notes

dark chocolate brown sugar dried fruit syrupy

Flavor Breakdown

Body
4/5
Acidity
2/5
Sweetness
3/5
Bitterness
4/5
Aroma
4/5
